title: Uruguayan-Style Choripan Sandwich
description: A classic Uruguayan street food, this choripan sandwich features grilled chorizo sausage served on a crusty bun with chimichurri sauce.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan chorizo sausage
ingredients.notes: Look for sausage with a high percentage of pork for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.notes: A crusty, slightly sweet bread is perfect for this sandwich

ingredients.name: Chimichurri sauce
ingredients.notes: Argentinean in origin, this herby, tangy sauce is a perfect complement to the spicy sausage

ingredients.name: Red onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced red onion adds a sweet, crunchy texture to the sandwich

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped parsley adds a bright, fresh flavor to the sandwich

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt or sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground black pepper is essential for this sandwich

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil for the best flavor

instructions: Thread the chorizo sausage onto skewers, if using.
Grill the chorizo sausage for 2-3 minutes per side, or until nicely charred and cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the hoagie rolls on the grill or in a toaster.
Spread a layer of chimichurri sauce on the bottom half of each roll.
Add a few slices of grilled chorizo sausage on top of the sauce.
Top the sausage with thinly sliced red onion and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
